chapter_title.en: Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

text: 4521 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ تَطَيَّبَتْ لِغَيْرِ زَوْجِهَا لَمْ تُقْبَلْ مِنْهَا صَلاَةٌ حَتَّى تَغْتَسِلَ مِنْ طِيبِهَا كَغُسْلِهَا مِنْ جَنَابَتِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4521 - Imam (as) said:
"Any woman who applies perfume for someone other than her husband, her prayer will not be accepted until she washes off the perfume as she would wash after a state of major ritual impurity (janabah)."
